title: Aura spice
content:
{{Top|ncl}}
{{Cut|canon=1|Star Wars drafts}}
'''Aura spice''', also called '''Auraspice''' or '''[[Spice/Legends|Spice]]''', was a valuable substance carried by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and his charge, the [[Prince/Legends|princess]]. They had 200 pounds of it concealed with them on [[Aquilae (The Star Wars)|Aquilae]].

When the two bureaucrats evacuate to Aquilae from the [[Death Star/Legends|space fortress]], they find one of the hidden containers near their landing site. They fight over it and are captured by the General.

[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] smuggled Auraspice for the [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Oxus]], apparently losing a shipment of [[Akurian spice]] with [[Montross (bounty hunter)|Montross]]. As a result he was deeply in debt to [[Oxus]].

==Behind the scenes==
Aura spice takes the place of the [[Gold/Legends|gold]] hidden inside staves of wood in Akira Kurosawa's ''Hidden Fortress'', the immediate inspiration for [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|Episode IV]]. It also becomes a minor plot point in future drafts, resurfacing as "spice" or Auraspice in the [[Adventures of the Starkiller, Episode I: The Star Wars|second draft]], and becoming a substance smuggled by Han Solo.
